Schema Document Properties

Target Namespace
None
Element and Attribute Namespaces
  • Global element and attribute declarations belong to this schema's target namespace.
  • By default, local element declarations belong to this schema's target namespace.
  • By default, local attribute declarations belong to this schema's target namespace.
Schema Composition
  • This schema imports schema(s) from the following namespace(s):
    • http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink (at xlink.xsd)
    • http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns# (at rdf.xsd)

...

Type

Used By

XML Instance Representation

 rfc="" [0..1]
>

Element: acrodef

Type
acrodefType
Used By
acronymType

XML Instance Representation 

<acrodef
 id="" [0..1]
 level="" [0..1]
 mark="" [0..1]
 change="" [0..1]
 rfc="" [0..1]
>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   Start Group: SPARCON [0..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         <subscrpt> ... </subscrpt> [1]
         <supscrpt> ... </supscrpt> [1]
      End Choice
   End Group: SPARCON
</acrodef>

 mark="" [0..1]

            <parasigdata> ... </parasigdata> [1]
            <quantity> ... </quantity> [1]

            <ftnref> ... </ftnref> [1]
            <acronym> ... </acronym> [1]
            <acroterm> ... </acroterm> [1]

   Start Choice [1..*]

            Start Choice [1]
               <ein> ... </ein> [1]

               <acroterm> ... </acroterm> [1]
            End Choice
            Start Choice [1]
               <seqlist> ... </seqlist> [1]

Type
itemType
Used By
seqlistType, randlistType

XML Instance Representation 

<item
 refapplic="" [0..1]
 id="" [0..1]
 level="" [0..1]
 mark="" [0..1]
 change="" [0..1]
 rfc="" [0..1]
>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   <applic> ... </applic> [0..1]
   Start Choice [1..*]
      <note> ... </note> [1]
      <para> ... </para> [1]
      Start Group: paracon [0..*]
         Start Choice [1]
            Start Choice [1]
               <ein> ... </ein> [1]
               <cb> ... </cb> [1]
               <parasigdata> ... </parasigdata> [1]
               <quantity> ... </quantity> [1]
               <xref> ... </xref> [1]
               <indxflag> ... </indxflag> [1]
               <change> ... </change> [1]
               <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
               <symbol> ... </symbol> [1]
               <subscrpt> ... </subscrpt> [1]
               <supscrpt> ... </supscrpt> [1]
               <refdm> ... </refdm> [1]
               <reftp> ... </reftp> [1]
               <ftnote> ... </ftnote> [1]
               <ftnref> ... </ftnref> [1]
               <acronym> ... </acronym> [1]
               <acroterm> ... </acroterm> [1]
            End Choice
            Start Choice [1]
               <seqlist> ... </seqlist> [1]
               <randlist> ... </randlist> [1]
               <deflist> ... </deflist> [1]
            End Choice
         End Choice
      End Group: paracon
   End Choice
</item>

<xs:element name="item" type="itemType"/>

 refapplic="" [0..1]

 level="" [0..1]
 mark="" [0..1]

   <applic> ... </applic> [0..1]
   Start Choice [1..*]
      <para> ... </para> [1]
      Start Group: paracon [0..*]
         Start Choice [1]
            Start Choice [1]
               <ein> ... </ein> [1]
               <cb> ... </cb> [1]
               <parasigdata> ... </parasigdata> [1]
               <quantity> ... </quantity> [1]
               <xref> ... </xref> [1]

               <ftnote> ... </ftnote> [1]
               <ftnref> ... </ftnref> [1]
               <acronym> ... </acronym> [1]
               <acroterm> ... </acroterm> [1]
            End Choice
            Start Choice [1]
               <seqlist> ... </seqlist> [1]
               <randlist> ... </randlist> [1]
               <deflist> ... </deflist> [1]
            End Choice
         End Choice
      End Group: paracon
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation

      <xs:element ref="applic" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:choice maxOccurs="unbounded">

      </xs:choice>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attribute ref="refapplic"/>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="bodyatt"/>
</xs:complexType>

      <xs:element ref="polref" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="datacond" minOccurs="0"/>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="bodyatt"/>
</xs:complexType>

   <addmod> ... </addmod> [0..*]

      <xs:element ref="addmod" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>

</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: issnoType

Used By
issno

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 issno="issnovalueType" [1]
 inwork="" [0..1]
 type="issnotypeType" [0..1]
/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="issnoType">
   <xs:attribute name="issno" type="issnovalueType" use="required"/>
   <xs:attribute ref="inwork"/>
   <xs:attribute name="type" type="issnotypeType" default="new"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: itemType

Used By
item

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 refapplic="" [0..1]
 id="" [0..1]
 level="" [0..1]
 mark="" [0..1]
 change="" [0..1]
 rfc="" [0..1]
>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   <applic> ... </applic> [0..1]
   Start Choice [1..*]
      <note> ... </note> [1]
      <para> ... </para> [1]
      Start Group: paracon [0..*]
         Start Choice [1]
            Start Choice [1]
               <ein> ... </ein> [1]
               <cb> ... </cb> [1]
               <parasigdata> ... </parasigdata> [1]
               <quantity> ... </quantity> [1]
               <xref> ... </xref> [1]
               <indxflag> ... </indxflag> [1]
               <change> ... </change> [1]
               <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
               <symbol> ... </symbol> [1]
               <subscrpt> ... </subscrpt> [1]
               <supscrpt> ... </supscrpt> [1]
               <refdm> ... </refdm> [1]
               <reftp> ... </reftp> [1]
               <ftnote> ... </ftnote> [1]
               <ftnref> ... </ftnref> [1]
               <acronym> ... </acronym> [1]
               <acroterm> ... </acroterm> [1]
            End Choice
            Start Choice [1]
               <seqlist> ... </seqlist> [1]
               <randlist> ... </randlist> [1]
               <deflist> ... </deflist> [1]
            End Choice
         End Choice
      End Group: paracon
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="itemType" mixed="true">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:element ref="applic" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:choice maxOccurs="unbounded">
         <xs:element ref="note"/>
         <xs:element ref="para"/>
         <xs:group ref="paracon" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
      </xs:choice>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attribute ref="refapplic"/>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="bodyatt"/>
</xs:complexType>

 rfc="" [0..1]
>
   <sampling> ... </sampling> [0..1]

   <refinspec> ... </refinspec> [0..*]

   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:element ref="sampling" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="threshold" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="refinspec" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="trigger" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="limrange" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="remarks" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attribute ref="typex" default="pe"/>
   <xs:attribute ref="condition"/>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="bodyatt"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: modelType

Used By
model

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 model="" [1]
>
   <version> ... </version> [0..*]
   Start Choice [0..*]
      <csnref> ... </csnref> [1]
      <nsn> ... </nsn> [1]
      <mfc> ... </mfc> [1]
      Start Sequence [0..*]
         <pnr> ... </pnr> [1]
         <serialno> ... </serialno> [0..*]
      End Sequence
   End Choice
   <batchno> ... </batchno> [0..1]
   <moduleno> ... </moduleno> [0..*]
   <customer> ... </customer> [0..*]
   <softprog> ... </softprog> [0..*]
   <maintlevel> ... </maintlevel> [0..1]
   <techconds> ... </techconds> [0..*]
   <opconds> ... </opconds> [0..*]
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="modelType">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:element ref="version" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:choice maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0">
         <xs:element ref="csnref"/>
         <xs:element ref="nsn"/>
         <xs:sequence>
            <xs:element ref="mfc"/>
            <xs:sequence maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0">
               <xs:element ref="pnr"/>
               <xs:element ref="serialno" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
            </xs:sequence>
         </xs:sequence>
      </xs:choice>
      <xs:element ref="batchno" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="moduleno" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="customer" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="softprog" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="maintlevel" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="techconds" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="opconds" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attribute ref="model" use="required"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: paraType

Used By
para

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 refapplic="" [0..1]
 id="" [0..1]
 level="" [0..1]
 mark="" [0..1]
 change="" [0..1]
 rfc="" [0..1]
 class="CLASSES" [0..1]
 commcls="COMMCLSS" [0..1]
 caveat="CAVEATS" [0..1]
>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   <applic> ... </applic> [0..1]
   Start Group: paracon [0..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         Start Choice [1]
            <ein> ... </ein> [1]
            <cb> ... </cb> [1]
            <parasigdata> ... </parasigdata> [1]
            <quantity> ... </quantity> [1]
            <xref> ... </xref> [1]
            <indxflag> ... </indxflag> [1]
            <change> ... </change> [1]
            <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
            <symbol> ... </symbol> [1]
            <subscrpt> ... </subscrpt> [1]
            <supscrpt> ... </supscrpt> [1]

            <ftnote> ... </ftnote> [1]
            <ftnref> ... </ftnref> [1]
            <acronym> ... </acronym> [1]
            <acroterm> ... </acroterm> [1]
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <seqlist> ... </seqlist> [1]
            <randlist> ... </randlist> [1]
            <deflist> ... </deflist> [1]
         End Choice
      End Choice
   End Group: paracon
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="paraType" mixed="true">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:element ref="applic" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:group ref="paracon" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attribute ref="refapplic"/>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="bodyatt"/>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="secur"/>
</xs:complexType>

   <refs> ... </refs> [0..1]

      <xs:element ref="refs" minOccurs="0"/>

   <xs:attributeGroup ref="bodyatt"/>
</xs:complexType>

<remarks> ... </remarks> [0..*]

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:group name="STATUS">

      <xs:element ref="datarest" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="dmsize" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="rpc"/>
      <xs:element ref="orig"/>
      <xs:element ref="applic"/>
      <xs:element ref="inlineapplics" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="techstd" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="brexref"/>
      <xs:element ref="qa" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>

         <xs:element ref="fic"/>
         <xs:element ref="ein"/>
      </xs:choice>
      <xs:element ref="skill" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="rfu" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="remarks" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
   </xs:sequence>
</xs:group>

Simple Type: DAY

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:positiveInteger < DAY (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: positiveInteger
  • pattern = \d{2}
  • value <= 31

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="DAY">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:positiveInteger">
      <xs:maxInclusive value="31"/>
      <xs:pattern value="\d{2}"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

  • Base XSD Type: positiveInteger
  • pattern = \d{2}

None

Content
  • Base XSD Type: nonNegativeInteger
  • total no. of digits = 2

Schema Component Representation

      <xs:totalDigits fixed="true" value="2"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: NMTOKEN
  • value comes from list: {'pre'|'post'|'prandpo'}

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="modtypeType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:NMTOKEN">
      <xs:enumeration value="pre"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="post"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="prandpo"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Simple Type: pmissuerType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:string < pmissuerType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = [A-Za-z0-9]{5}

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="pmissuerType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
      <xs:pattern value="[A-Za-z0-9]{5}"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Simple Type: releaseType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:NMTOKEN < releaseType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: NMTOKEN
  • value comes from list: {'before'|'with'|'after'}

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="releaseType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:NMTOKEN">
      <xs:enumeration value="before"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="with"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="after"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Simple Type: sdcType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:string < sdcType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = [A-Za-z0-9]{1,4}

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="sdcType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
      <xs:pattern value="[A-Za-z0-9]{1,4}"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Simple Type: tctypeType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:string < tctypeType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • value comes from list: {'pre'|'post'|'preandpo'}

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="tctypeType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
      <xs:enumeration value="pre"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="post"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="preandpo"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Simple Type: typexType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:NMTOKEN < typexType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: NMTOKEN
  • value comes from list: {'po'|'ev'|'pe'}

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="typexType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:NMTOKEN">
      <xs:enumeration value="po"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="ev"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="pe"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Simple Type: verstatusType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:string < verstatusType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = confirmed

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="verstatusType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
      <xs:pattern value="confirmed"/>
      <xs:pattern value="conditional"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Simple Type: xidtypeType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:NMTOKEN < xidtypeType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: NMTOKEN
  • value comes from list: {'figure'|'table'|'multimedia'|'supply'|'supequip'|'spares'|'para'|'step'|'sheet'|'multimediaobject'|'hotspot'|'param'|'other'}

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="xidtypeType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:NMTOKEN">
      <xs:enumeration value="figure"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="table"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="multimedia"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="supply"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="supequip"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="spares"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="para"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="step"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="sheet"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="multimediaobject"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="hotspot"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="param"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="other"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Simple Type: yesorno

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:int < yesorno (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: int
  • pattern = [01]

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="yesorno">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:int">
      <xs:pattern value="[01]"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Attribute Groups

Attribute Group: COMMSEC

Used By
,

XML Instance Representation 

commcls="COMMCLSS" [0..1]
caveat="CAVEATS" [0..1]

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:attributeGroup name="COMMSEC">
   <xs:attribute name="commcls" type="COMMCLSS"/>
   <xs:attribute name="caveat" type="CAVEATS"/>
</xs:attributeGroup>

Attribute Group: DATE

Used By
issdateType, pubdateType

XML Instance Representation 

year="" [1]
month="" [1]
day="" [1]

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:attributeGroup name="DATE">
   <xs:attribute ref="year" use="required"/>
   <xs:attribute ref="month" use="required"/>
   <xs:attribute ref="day" use="required"/>
</xs:attributeGroup>

Attribute Group: INSDEL

Used By
, nomenType, triggerType, identnoType, qtyType, timelimType, catType

XML Instance Representation 

level="" [0..1]
mark="" [0..1]
change="" [0..1]
rfc="" [0..1]

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:attributeGroup name="INSDEL">
   <xs:attribute ref="level"/>
   <xs:attribute ref="mark"/>
   <xs:attribute ref="change"/>
   <xs:attribute ref="rfc"/>
</xs:attributeGroup>

Attribute Group: PMDATA_STAT_POW

Used By
jackedType, safedevType, elecpwrType, hydpwrType, airpwrType, fuelType, waterType, fcposnType

XML Instance Representation 

status="" [1]
power="" [1]

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:attributeGroup name="PMDATA_STAT_POW">
   <xs:attribute ref="status" use="required"/>
   <xs:attribute ref="power" use="required"/>
</xs:attributeGroup>

Attribute Group: SECURIT

Used By
securityType

XML Instance Representation 

class="" [1]
commcls="COMMCLSS" [0..1]
caveat="CAVEATS" [0..1]

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:attributeGroup name="SECURIT">
   <xs:attribute ref="class" use="required"/>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="COMMSEC"/>
</xs:attributeGroup>

Attribute Group: bodyatt

Used By
datarestType, applicType, versrankType, csnrefType, nsnType, mfcType, pnrType, techcondsType, textual-descType, techcondType, condtitleType, prodListType, opcondsType, opcondType, instructType, distribType, expcontType, handlingType, destructType, discloseType, informType, copyrightType, paraType, einType, refdmType, reftpType, acronymType, acrodefType, cbType, changeEltType, ftnoteType, seqlistType, itemType, noteType, randlistType, deflistType, termType, defType, polrefType, datacondType, modType, pType, inspectionType, limitType, refinspecType, deftaskType, zoneType, accpnlType, reqcblstType, cblstType, cbsublstType, cbdataType, cblocType, reqpersType, personType, perscatType, perskillType, tradeType, esttimeType, supequiType, toolType, supplyType, conType, spareType, warningType, cautionType, equipType, supervisType, limittypeType

XML Instance Representation 

id="" [0..1]
level="" [0..1]
mark="" [0..1]
change="" [0..1]
rfc="" [0..1]

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:attributeGroup name="bodyatt">
   <xs:attribute ref="id"/>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="INSDEL"/>
</xs:attributeGroup>

Attribute Group: secur

Used By
paraType, ftnoteType, seqlistType, titleType, randlistType, deflistType

XML Instance Representation 

class="CLASSES" [0..1]
commcls="COMMCLSS" [0..1]
caveat="CAVEATS" [0..1]

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:attributeGroup name="secur">
   <xs:attribute name="class" type="CLASSES"/>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="COMMSEC"/>
</xs:attributeGroup>

Glossary

Abstract (Applies to complex type definitions and element declarations). An abstract element or complex type cannot used to validate an element instance. If there is a reference to an abstract element, only element declarations that can substitute the abstract element can be used to validate the instance. For references to abstract type definitions, only derived types can be used.

All Model Group Child elements can be provided in any order in instances. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#element-all.

Choice Model Group Only one from the list of child elements and model groups can be provided in instances. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#element-choice.

Collapse Whitespace Policy Replace tab, line feed, and carriage return characters with space character (Unicode character 32). Then, collapse contiguous sequences of space characters into single space character, and remove leading and trailing space characters.

Disallowed Substitutions (Applies to element declarations). If substitution is specified, then substitution group members cannot be used in place of the given element declaration to validate element instances. If derivation methods, e.g. extension, restriction, are specified, then the given element declaration will not validate element instances that have types derived from the element declaration's type using the specified derivation methods. Normally, element instances can override their declaration's type by specifying an xsi:type attribute.

Key Constraint Like Uniqueness Constraint, but additionally requires that the specified value(s) must be provided. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#cIdentity-constraint_Definitions.

Key Reference Constraint Ensures that the specified value(s) must match value(s) from a Key Constraint or Uniqueness Constraint. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#cIdentity-constraint_Definitions.

Model Group Groups together element content, specifying the order in which the element content can occur and the number of times the group of element content may be repeated. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#Model_Groups.

Nillable (Applies to element declarations). If an element declaration is nillable, instances can use the xsi:nil attribute. The xsi:nil attribute is the boolean attribute, nil, from the http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance namespace. If an element instance has an xsi:nil attribute set to true, it can be left empty, even though its element declaration may have required content.

Notation A notation is used to identify the format of a piece of data. Values of elements and attributes that are of type, NOTATION, must come from the names of declared notations. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#cNotation_Declarations.

Preserve Whitespace Policy Preserve whitespaces exactly as they appear in instances.

Prohibited Derivations (Applies to type definitions). Derivation methods that cannot be used to create sub-types from a given type definition.

Prohibited Substitutions (Applies to complex type definitions). Prevents sub-types that have been derived using the specified derivation methods from validating element instances in place of the given type definition.

Replace Whitespace Policy Replace tab, line feed, and carriage return characters with space character (Unicode character 32).

Sequence Model Group Child elements and model groups must be provided in the specified order in instances. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#element-sequence.

Substitution Group Elements that are members of a substitution group can be used wherever the head element of the substitution group is referenced.

Substitution Group Exclusions (Applies to element declarations). Prohibits element declarations from nominating themselves as being able to substitute a given element declaration, if they have types that are derived from the original element's type using the specified derivation methods.

Target Namespace The target namespace identifies the namespace that components in this schema belongs to. If no target namespace is provided, then the schema components do not belong to any namespace.

Uniqueness Constraint Ensures uniqueness of an element/attribute value, or a combination of values, within a specified scope. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#cIdentity-constraint_Definitions.
